facebook.content:
Matthew 6:33 (NIV) 
"But seek first his kingdom and his righteousness, and all these things will be given to you as well."

In a world where worry and anxiety can easily take over, remember that seeking God's kingdom first is a powerful strategy for living above the chaos. When we prioritize the King's business, He promises to meet our needs and provide for us in incredible ways. What is one area of your life where you're making seeking God's kingdom a top priority right now?

instagram.content:
"But he said to me, 'My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness.' Therefore I will boast all the more gladly about my weaknesses, so that Christ's power may rest on me."

Pastor Curtis says, "When you feel weak, don't hide it. Let your weakness be a doorway for the strength of Christ to flood in. Where are you feeling weak right now?"

tiktok.content:
"But the Lord is with me; I will not be afraid. What can mere mortals do to me?" - Psalm 118:6

This verse isn't just a promise of comfort, it's a declaration of authority. When you know Jesus is with you, you'll stop letting the opinions of others dictate your steps.
